We will not retain copies of Aadhaar, PAN, or GSTIN
do not store full numbers in any log or backup
must never be persisted as raw values
disable precise location, behavioural ads, and automated profiling by default
avoid collecting personal phone numbers unless required by law
until disclosed to the stock exchanges

use the Indus Ledger data room with audit trail

must_detect.matched_text:
Internal Memo: DPDPA and SEBI PIT alignment for Vinyasa Robotics Limited (NSE-listed) — Monsoon Sprint release.
To: Compliance Desk and Secretarial Team, Vinyasa Robotics Limited; From: Legal and Data Governance.
Under the Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023, personal data means any data about an individual who is identifiable by or in relation to such data; our Data Fusion Policy 2.0 applies to CRM, HRMS, and field-service apps.
We will not retain copies of Aadhaar, PAN, or GSTIN in the sales CRM; use token references (e.g., Aadhaar_ID_Token, PAN_Token) and do not store full numbers in any log or backup.
Form labels may read PAN: [AAAAA9999A] and GSTIN: [22AAAAA0000A1Z5], but these are placeholders and must never be persisted as raw values.
For child Data Principals (under 18), route consent through the Pravah Consent Manager and disable precise location, behavioural ads, and automated profiling by default.
Subject A-17 (Employee ID E-00412) disclosed a psychiatrist-recommended treatment schedule in the Lotus Shield wellness portal; treat this as health data requiring heightened access controls and explicit purpose limitation.
No other special-category attributes (biometric templates, sexual orientation, religion, union membership, genetic tests, or political opinions) are to be collected in pilot workflows, notwithstanding wellness metaphors in UI copy.
The Diversity First Charter is abstract DEI guidance and does not authorise collection of sensitive attributes unless strictly necessary and documented.
Under SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, drafts of Q2 results, board agenda, and capex pipeline are UPSI until disclosed to the stock exchanges; follow the UPSI Handling SOP and close the trading window accordingly.
As of 15 May, the robotics platform roadmap was publicly announced via press release and stock exchange update, so references to that roadmap in the Monsoon Sprint deck are not MNPI.
Do not share internal dashboards on team chat channels with external vendors; use the Indus Ledger data room with audit trail.
Reminder: investor FAQs may cite city names like Pune or Kochi, or fictional team analogies such as the Bangalore Bluecaps, but must avoid implying future revenue figures or undisclosed order wins.
